column1: Guaranty Trust Holding Company (GTCO) is committed to supporting the transitioning of the environment to
a sustainable, low-carbon economy that balances society's environmental, social, and economic needs. GTCO
is committed to managing identified climate risks in its business and operations by building on its existing
Environmental and Social Risk Management (ESRM) policy and benchmarking its practices to global best
standards and pronouncements on climate risk management. As part of its commitment, the bank has
developed its CLIMATE RISK POLICY (approved by the Board) which highlights its commitment, strategy, and
